channel.title: marketing on apio
channel.description: Recent content in marketing on apio

item.title: Collect Email Addresses without Email Marketing Tools
item.description: Email sign-ups from website visitors is one of the most crucial ways to grow your audience, whether you’re looking to convert subscribers to customers or to directly communicate to your clients. In this post we’ll show how to setup easy email sign-up form for free on your website. We built this because after looking into other email marketing platforms (MailChimp, Constant Contacts, OmniSend, etc.), comparing their services, plans, and going through those articles titled "Five Best Free Email Marketing Services".
